seasonArc: Elisa Balsamo's 2026 spring saw the Italian fast-woman consistently in the mix without quite landing the headline result. On home roads at Milano-Sanremo Donne she couldn't follow the Poggio selection and was left in the chasing peloton, sprinting to eighth at +0:09. Across the rest of the block she was a regular in the bunch finales — sixth at the Copenhagen Sprint Women and in the field at the Ronde van Vlaanderen (13th) — a season of solid placings for the Lidl-Trek sprinter on days that increasingly slipped over the climbs before the line.
